title: scleria lucida
intro: Scleria lucida, also known as the bright umbrella sedge or the shiny umbrella sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Scleria lucida include its potential use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, Scleria lucida is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice for wound healing.
